customFaq.question: Can I get approved with bad credit?
customFaq.answer: Yes. ReadyRide specializes in helping people with all credit situations — bad credit, no credit, bankruptcy, and consumer proposals. We work with 25+ lending partners to find you the best option. Our approval rate is 98%.

customFaq.question: Do I need a co-signer?
customFaq.answer: Not necessarily. Many of our customers get approved on their own. During the application process, our financing team will let you know if a co-signer would help you get a better rate or approval, but it is not always required.

customFaq.question: What is the minimum credit score needed?
customFaq.answer: There is no minimum credit score to apply. We work with all credit situations and our lending partners evaluate your full financial picture, not just your credit score. Apply in 3 minutes and we will find the best option for you.

customFaq.question: Will applying hurt my credit score?
customFaq.answer: No. Our initial application uses a soft credit check which does not impact your credit score. You can apply with no obligation and no effect on your credit.

customFaq.question: How long does the approval process take?
customFaq.answer: Most applicants receive a same-day financing decision. The online application takes about 3 minutes, and our team typically responds within a few hours.

customFaq.question: Can I get approved after bankruptcy or a consumer proposal?
customFaq.answer: Absolutely. Whether you have been discharged from bankruptcy or are currently in an active consumer proposal, we have lending partners who specialize in these situations. Many of our customers came to us after bankruptcy and are now rebuilding their credit.

customFaq.question: I am new to Canada. Can I still get a car loan?
customFaq.answer: Yes. ReadyRide has a dedicated Newcomers Program for people new to Canada with no Canadian credit history. Whether you arrived recently or have been here a few years without established credit, we can help.

customFaq.question: What documents do I need to apply?
customFaq.answer: To get started, you just need to complete our 3-minute online application. For final approval, you will typically need proof of income, proof of address, and valid ID. Your financing advisor will walk you through exactly what is needed.

customFaq.question: Do you deliver vehicles across Ontario?
customFaq.answer: Yes. ReadyRide serves all of Ontario with a 100% online financing process. We can arrange delivery or pickup at our Gloucester location. We have helped families in over 100 Ontario communities.

customFaq.question: Can I trade in my current vehicle?
customFaq.answer: Yes, we accept trade-ins. Your trade-in value can be applied toward your down payment. Bring your vehicle to our Gloucester location or speak with your advisor about the trade-in process.

greetingOverride: Hi there! Welcome to ReadyRide. I am here to help you find the right vehicle and financing — no matter your credit situation. How can I help you today?
signatureOverride: ReadyRide — Ontario's Trusted Bad Credit Car Dealership | readyride.ca
